title: Business Data Analytics
shortSummary: Using data to make smarter, faster, and more confident business decisions. The analytics ladder — from descriptive to prescriptive — is the marketer's decision-making framework.
whyItMatters: Understanding the analytics maturity curve, key data sources, building dashboards, data quality, and making decisions from imperfect data is what turns marketers from gut-feel operators into evidence-based strategists.
coreConcepts: The analytics ladder (descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, prescriptive)
Key marketing data sources (CRM, web analytics, social listening, surveys, POS)
Data quality (garbage in garbage out, collection methods, sample bias)
